content: Generated Phase 3 Claude API Integration walkthrough at docs/walkthroughs/WALKTHROUGH-phase3-claude-integration.md. Covers: environment config, AgentResponse types, ClaudeApiService HTTP client, ConnectivityService, AgentRepository orchestrator, SessionNotifier state management, JournalSessionScreen UI, Edge Function proxy. Includes complete message flow trace, ADR references (ADR-0005, ADR-0006), and 8 guided reading stops with progressive disclosure.
